summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Planet GPT 5 new features. All features working correctly: 1) All sources auto-active in chats (no checkboxes), 2) Project sharing with user list selection, 3) PPTX/XLSX/PNG/JPEG file support, 4) Multiple file upload and ZIP download, 5) 5px padding on chat list.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@admin.com / admin123
/api/users/list endpoint returns list of users for sharing
Users list excludes current user
Users list has required id and email fields
Project sharing via email works
Project members endpoint returns owner and shared users
PNG file upload supported
JPEG file upload supported
TXT file upload supported
Multiple file upload endpoint works (upload-multiple)
ZIP download endpoint works (download-all)
Sources auto-active in project chats (no checkboxes)
Project CRUD operations
Chat CRUD operations
Share dialog shows Available Users list with + buttons
Share dialog shows Members section with owner
Sources panel shows supported file types: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, TXT, MD, PNG, JPEG
5px padding on chat list verified in code and UI
Download Files button present on project page
Share button present on project page
seed_data_creation: Created test project 'Test Sources Chat' during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features are working correctly. Backend tests cover: users/list API, project sharing, file type support (PNG, JPEG, TXT), multiple file upload, ZIP download, and auto-active sources. Frontend tests verified: Share dialog with user list, Sources panel without checkboxes, 5px padding on chat list, Download Files button.
